arts.ttl: Premier League release statement during Chelsea vs Ipswich amid Enzo Maresca nightmare
arts.sum: The Premier League have explained why the Video Assistant referee (VAR) overturned the decision to disallow Ipswich’s second goal against Chelsea during Sunday's Stamdord Bridge clash. The game at Stamford Bridge is the first one in the Premier League for Chelsea to use semi-automated offside technology.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘need more support’ from fans – Maresca
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca again urged Chelsea fans to get behind their side following Sunday’s 2-2 draw with Ipswich Town. The Blues missed a chance to pull away from teams around them in the table by dropping two points against relegation-threatened opponents. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca frustrated with Chelsea fans for 'environment' created in Ipswich draw
arts.sum: Chelsea boss believes his side were influenced by the tension in the stands

arts.ttl: Maresca frustrated by Chelsea ‘mistakes’ after Ipswich draw
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has said Chelsea were to blame for their ‘mistakes’ during the club’s costly 2-2 draw with Ipswich Town. Chelsea dropped points for the second successive Premier League game after being held by relegation-threatened Ipswich at Stamford Bridge. arts.ttl: Manchester United set up FA Cup final with Chelsea after beating local rivals
arts.sum: The defending champions were good value as they reached their third final in a row.

arts.ttl: Familiar woes for tepid Chelsea against Ipswich as Champions League hopes weaken again
arts.sum: Champions League football edging away from Chelsea ahead of difficult run-in

arts.ttl: Chelsea 2-2 Ipswich: 4 talking points as Blues slip again in Champions League race
arts.sum: Chelsea's 2-2 draw with Ipswich Town set the pulses racing at Stamford Bridge, sometimes for all the wrong reasons from a home side's perspective.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's final fixtures compared to Premier League rivals as Champions League race takes new twist
arts.sum: If Nottingham Forest and Chelsea are both still in the race for Champions League qualification come the final day of the season then this will be huge. Chelsea could make a great statement in the race for the Champions League qualification and show their European top-flight credentials.
